framework.name: Manufacturing Economic Multiplier Effect
framework.description: Every dollar spent on manufacturing generates $2.69 in total economic activity, one of the highest multipliers of any sector. This creates significant ripple effects through supply chains, logistics, and supporting services.
framework.raw_quote: For every dollar spent on manufacturing, it creates $2.69 in total economic activity. This is one of the largest impacts of any sector.

source.title: Manufacturing in America – Contributing to Our Economy, …
